title: Boiler Upgrade Scheme statistics: March 2025
body: "These statistics show the uptake of the Boiler Upgrade Scheme to date including the number of vouchers applications and redemptions, as well as the costs of installation.   Correction notice: 31 July 2025  The data in Table A1.1B has been revised. Due to a data processing error, the original version of this table - first published on 24 April 2025 – was under-reporting the number of domestic BUS applications per 10,000 households. Please use the latest statistics release for the most up-to-date version. No other tables in the Boiler Upgrade Scheme monthly statistics are impacted by this error.   Enquiries about these statistics should be directed to: amelia.ash@energysecurity.gov.uk. "

taxons.title: Energy and climate change: evidence and analysis
